name: Zesty Turkey & Rice
recipeIngredient: 2 cups turkey light meat, skinless, cooked and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, mix the chicken broth, basil, garlic powder, hot pepper sauce, and stewed tomatoes.
2. Heat over medium-high heat until it comes to a boil.
3. Stir in the cooked rice. Reduce heat to low.
4. Cover and cook for 20 minutes.
5. Stir in the peas and turkey. Cover and cook for an additional 5 minutes or until the rice is tender and most of the liquid has been absorbed.
